name: Oriental Ginger Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
1 can VEG-ALL Mixed Vegetables, with liquid (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 2-inch-long strips.
2. In a quart bowl, combine soy sauce, sherry, garlic, onion, brown sugar, and 1 teaspoon of ginger.
3. Add chicken and stir until well coated.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet; stir-fry chicken until cooked.
5. Meanwhile, place VEG-ALL, water chestnuts (with liquid) in a two-quart saucepan and add the remaining teaspoon of ginger. Bring to boil.
6. Stir in rice, remove from heat, cover, and let stand 5 minutes.
7. Serve chicken over rice and vegetables.
